name: Git Panel UI
description: Renders the Git status panel showing changed files, recent commits, and provides UI actions for staging, committing, and pushing. Refreshes lazily on demand and integrates with the commit dialog.

Dialogs/CommitDialog.cs.content:
class CommitResult
  Message: string
  Cancelled: bool
class CommitDialog
  Show(List<GitFileChange> selectedFiles, string suggestedMessage) -> CommitResult

Managers/GitPanelManager.cs.content:
class GitPanelManager
  MarkDirty() -> void
  RefreshIfNeeded(ScrollViewer container) -> void
  RefreshAsync(ScrollViewer container) -> Task
class GitCommitInfo
  FullHash: string
  ShortHash: string
  Author: string
  RelativeTime: string
  Message: string
class GitFileChange
  Status: string
  FilePath: string
  DisplayStatus: string

dependencies: FileLockManager to block commits during active locks
